ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tanks" (
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tank */,
  "tank_name" TEXT /* Name of the tank */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of tank (e.g., Light Tank, Heavy Tank) */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* Tier classification of the tank */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the tank */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the tank */,
  "armament" TEXT /* Type of main armament */,
  "armor" INTEGER /* Thickness of the front armor */,
  "fuel_capacity" INTEGER /* Fuel capacity in liters */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Maximum operational range in kilometers */,
  "crew" INTEGER /* Number of crew members */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the tank in tons */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tanks_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tanks_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tanks_tier FOREIGN KEY ("tier") REFERENCES tiers ("tier_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle record */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tank involved in the battle */,
  "battles" INTEGER /* Total number of battles fought */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate as a percentage */,
  "dpb" INTEGER /* Damage per battle (DPB) */,
  "avg_spots" REAL /* Average spots per battle */,
  "kpg" REAL /* Kill-to-death ratio (KPG) */,
  "wn8" INTEGER /* WN8 performance rating */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the battle */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the battle */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing force */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the battle in minutes */,
  "total_vehicles" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles involved in the battle */,
  "friendly_forces" INTEGER /* Number of friendly vehicles */,
  "enemy_forces" INTEGER /* Number of enemy vehicles */,
  "total_damage" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the tank in the battle */,
  "total_kills" INTEGER /* Total number of enemy vehicles destroyed */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of friendly vehicles lost */,
  "strategy_used" TEXT /* Strategy employed during the battle */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "flag" TEXT /* URL to the flag image of the country */,
  "military_budget" TEXT /* Annual military budget of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the country's military capabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tank type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tank type (e.g., Light Tank, Heavy Tank) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tank type */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the tank type in combat (e.g., reconnaissance, assault) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tier */,
  "tier_level" INTEGER /* Tier level for classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tier level */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for a tank to be classified in this tier (e.g., speed, armor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, military personnel) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level or clearance of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the battle record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles_battles" (
  "vehicle_battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record in the many-to-many relationship */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tank involved in the battle */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battle record */,
  "vehicle_role" TEXT /* Role of the vehicle in the specific battle (e.g., support, assault) */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Damage dealt by the vehicle in the battle */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the vehicle in the battle */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the vehicle in the battle */,
  "spots" INTEGER /* Number of enemy vehicles spotted by the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_battles_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_battles_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)
